headline: ROTATION CONFIRMATION. Live composite 77.9 (Established band). Nine consecutive years 100% on HRC Corporate Equality Index (LGBTQ workplace equality). Forbes Best Employers for Diversity 2018-2023; five consecutive perfect scores on Disability Equality Index 2019-2023. Glassdoor 'Best Places to Work in Consulting/Finance/Insurance' 2026. Year 10 of 15-year diversity roadmap; 57% increase in women in leadership over 3 years; ~50% employee resource group participation. Comprehensive benefits including pension plan (rare in current US corporate landscape) — strong EMP signal. No discrete in-window April 14-28 event. Confirmation appropriate at 77.9. Confidence LOW because no individual evidence-based assessment has been conducted; rotation confirmation only.

evidence.finding: Ninth consecutive 100% on HRC Corporate Equality Index — sustained LGBTQ workplace equality leadership.
Year 10 of 15-year diversity roadmap; 57% increase in women in leadership; ~50% employee resource group participation.
Pension plan offered (rare in current US corporate landscape); education assistance; competitive health benefits; community service time off.
Strengthening culture of belonging — sustained corporate-responsibility narrative.
